examples: Tolstoy was hardly aware of all the commotion.
Behind all of this commotion are day traders, those creatures of the dot-com era.
Noticing the commotion, she reached into her purse for a handful of hard candies and offered them to the kids in return for their good behavior.
About 50 yards behind the commotion a silent crowd of people has gathered to watch proceedings.
He denied wrongdoing in court, though he apologized publicly for the commotion surrounding the trial.
